header.apiTitle: API the dashboard is talking to

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Your services and credits at a glance.

deliveries.title: Deliveries
deliveries.description: Every webhook Carillon has fired across your services — reference only, never content.

billing.title: Billing
billing.description: Buy credits in packs of 5; spend 1 to watch a service for a month. Testing is always free.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Account, member mailboxes, and your capability link.

watches.emptyDescription: Add a service to watch a folder or an addressbook on one of your accounts. Carillon fires a signed webhook the instant it changes.
watches.noneOnAccount: No services on this account yet.
watches.paused: Paused — no events (paid time keeps running)
watches.autoRenewOn: Auto-renew on — renews from your pool
watches.autoRenewOff: Auto-renew off — stops when the paid month ends

services.descConfigure: Pick what to watch and point the signed webhook at your endpoint.
services.descVerify: Watch your own endpoint fire — read-only, no test button.
services.descDone: Activate the service to start watching — 1 credit per month.
services.needAccountBody: Connect a mail or contacts account, then choose what to watch on it.

type.label: What to watch
type.emailHint: An IMAP mailbox, watched live over IDLE.
type.addressbookHint: A CardDAV addressbook, polled for changes (WebDAV has no push).

services.accountHintEmail: The service watches a folder on this account, reusing its stored credential.
services.accountHintAddressbook: The addressbook is watched with this account’s stored credential.
services.folderError: Couldn’t list folders — type the folder name to watch.
services.folderHint: One service watches one folder. The inbox is the usual choice.
services.carddavUrlHint: The full CardDAV collection URL. WebDAV has no push, so Carillon polls it for sync-token changes.
services.addressbooksError: Couldn't list this account's addressbooks — check the credential (Fastmail app passwords need the Contacts/CardDAV scope), or paste the collection URL below.
services.carddavNoSync: Reachable, but this collection reports no sync-token.
services.carddavFail: Could not reach the addressbook — check the URL and the account credential.
services.notifyInvalid: Must be https:// (or http:// on localhost for a local sink).
services.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts — wait a moment before trying again.
services.webhookBodyEmail: Each change POSTs {account, event, uid} — never message content — signed with HMAC-SHA256. You’ll get the signing secret on the next step.
services.webhookBodyAddressbook: Each change POSTs {account, event, resource} — never contact content — signed with HMAC-SHA256. You’ll get the signing secret on the next step.
services.trialGranted: Free watch time on us — this is your first {{provider}} service. It's watching now; add credits to keep it going after.
services.conflictAddressbook: A service already watches this addressbook on {{login}}.
services.addError: Could not add the service. Please try again.

onboarding.descIdentify: Choose what to watch — we find your provider and how to sign in.
onboarding.descAuth: Enter the mailbox’s app password — it’s stored with this service and used to watch it.
onboarding.whatToWatch: What do you want to watch?
onboarding.hintEmail: We look up your provider’s IMAP settings and how to sign in — just pick one.
onboarding.hintContacts: We look up your provider’s CardDAV server — just confirm it.
onboarding.signInHow: How do you want to sign in?
onboarding.contactsOauthSoon: This provider also offers OAuth for contacts — that's coming soon. For now, sign in with an app password.
onboarding.noImapFoundBody: Enter your IMAP server manually below.
onboarding.noDavFoundBody: Enter your CardDAV server URL manually below.
onboarding.notTlsBody: Carillon watches over implicit TLS (usually port 993). STARTTLS/plain aren’t wired yet — pick a TLS endpoint or set the host/port manually.
onboarding.oauthBody: A popup takes you to {{provider}} to authorize mail access. Carillon keeps a refresh token — never your password.
onboarding.appPwTitle: Use an app password where possible
onboarding.appPwBodyEmail: The password is sent to the server only for this read-only probe; it’s encrypted at rest when you add the account.
onboarding.appPwBodyContacts: Many providers (e.g. Fastmail) use the same app password for email and contacts. It’s encrypted at rest when you add the account.
onboarding.testingFree: Testing is free and repeatable — nothing is charged.
onboarding.readyToWatchBody: Reachable, authenticated, and IDLE + QRESYNC all check out.
onboarding.readyNewOnly: Ready to watch — new messages only
onboarding.readyNewOnlyBody: This provider doesn’t support QRESYNC, so only new messages will be watched — flag changes and deletions won’t be tracked.
onboarding.freeCreditGranted: Welcome! 1 free credit added to your pool 🎁
onboarding.freeCreditClaimed: This mailbox’s free credit was already claimed by another account.
onboarding.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts — wait a moment before trying again.
onboarding.couldNotStart: Could not start sign-in. Please try again.
onboarding.testFailed: The connection test failed. Check the settings and try again.
onboarding.authFailed: Authentication failed — check the password and try again.
onboarding.couldNotAdd: Could not add the account. Please try again.
